summary_text: Thesis: Phase medical AI by accountability first, capability second, and scale last. - Start with low-risk, decision-support use cases where humans stay the final authority. - Build audit, explanation, and escalation paths before expanding scope. - Move to higher-stakes workflows only after evidence, monitoring, and ownership are stable. consulted_worldview_source: /Users/masayuki/.claude/docs/philosophy.md used_obsidian_for_worldview: no worldview_contract_applied: true
